description: Grandfathered source files above their surface's nonblank-LOC cap (frontend: src/**.{ts,vue}; rust: src-tauri/**/src/**.rs — higher cap because unit tests live inline). Entries may shrink but not grow; new files above the cap are rejected. Regenerate with `npm run check:loc -- --update`.

src-tauri/src/capture_commands.rs.reason: Grandfathered hotspot (docs/Gaps.md GAP-45/GAP-47). Shrink only; split when next touched. 1211->1215: rename retarget on transcript-sidecar moves (Codex PR #46 round 4). 1215->1219: set_capture_config must also preserve the per-vault lists settings object (defaultList/listOrder, the tasks_folder preservation rule extended) — two fields + the invariant comment.

src-tauri/src/transcription.rs.reason: Grandfathered hotspot (docs/Gaps.md GAP-45/GAP-47). Shrink only; split when next touched.

src-tauri/capture/src/session.rs.reason: Grandfathered hotspot (docs/Gaps.md GAP-45/GAP-47). Shrink only; split when next touched.

src-tauri/core/src/capture_config.rs.reason: Crossed the 800 cap adding the app-global DocumentImportConfig section + per-vault documents_folder (Document Import via Pandoc). Bumped 853->893 for the GAP-02 save-side fix (load_config_for_update aborts a save on a non-missing config read error instead of defaulting + clobbering all sections) plus its two regression tests; 893->900 when the task-branch merge layered a log::warn! diagnostic onto that helper's error arm. Sits beside the existing VaultCaptureConfig/McpConfig sections and their parse/serialize; splitting config into per-section modules is a separate refactor. Shrink only.

src-tauri/transcribe/src/model.rs.reason: Grandfathered hotspot (docs/Gaps.md GAP-45/GAP-47). Shrink only; split when next touched.

src-tauri/core/src/capture_paths.rs.reason: Grandfathered hotspot (docs/Gaps.md GAP-45/GAP-47). Shrink only; split when next touched.

src-tauri/core/src/services.rs.reason: Crossed the 800 cap adding the tasks-root containment guard in add_task (a list symlinked/junctioned outside the tasks root would accept the write but hide the task from the walkers) plus its symlink-escape regression test (Codex PR #53 re-review). The services layer already holds vault/tasks/recordings functions over one ServicePaths; splitting it into per-domain modules is a separate refactor. Shrink only; split when next touched.

src/stores/capture.ts.reason: Grandfathered hotspot (docs/Gaps.md GAP-47). Shrink only; split when next touched.
